subcodes.first_line: O Divine Forgiver! The servant of the court of the wise Gushtasb hath turned his face away from the darkened world and hastened to the realms above [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آمرزگارا بنده دربار گشتاسب دانا روی از جهان تاریک بتافت و بکشور بالا شتافت از
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @soul; spirit after death, @eulogies; reminiscences, @love of God
